name: AdAdvisor MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official AdAdvisor MCP server for querying Meta Ads performance data. Enables AI agents to retrieve account, campaign, ad set, and ad performance metrics and settings from Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram advertising). Remote streamable HTTP MCP server.
use_cases: Querying Meta Ads campaign performance from marketing analytics agents
Analyzing ad set metrics and optimization opportunities from media buying agents
Retrieving account-level advertising spend and ROI data from reporting agents
Monitoring ad performance and flagging underperformers from campaign management agents
not_for: Creating or modifying Meta Ads campaigns (query/read focus)
best_when: A digital marketer or agency running Meta Ads campaigns wants AI agents to analyze performance data — surfacing insights, flagging anomalies, and generating reports across accounts.
avoid_when: You need to create or modify ads (this is read-only). Also: ad spend data may include sensitive business performance information.

auth.notes: Bearer token authentication (adv_sk_... format). Obtain via AdAdvisor dashboard. Remote streamable HTTP endpoint requires token in headers.

pricing.notes: Pricing not publicly listed. Commercial service. Requires AdAdvisor account and Meta Ads connection.

performance.rate_limits: Unknown; Meta Ads Graph API rate limits apply upstream

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Ad performance data influences advertising spend decisions
Meta Ads data access requires business account and proper ad account permissions
Rate limits from upstream Meta Graph API may throttle large data pulls
Remote SaaS endpoint — data passes through AdAdvisor servers
Ad account data is sensitive business information — restrict agent access appropriately
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Ad spend data. Sensitive business performance data passes through AdAdvisor. Bearer token security. HTTPS enforced.

security_score_components.security_notes: Ad account performance data is sensitive. SaaS intermediary for Meta Ads. Token protection required. HTTPS on remote endpoint.
